name: drift-detect flags rule whose upstream URL returns HTTP 404 (source removed)
setup:
printf 'source:
  id: src-1
  authoritative_publisher: X
  authoritative_url: https://example.com/gone
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: 2026-05-01T00:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:S
rules: []
' > rule.yaml
